Visualize Enrichment of clustered genes

Uwe Schwartz

15/11/2024

Dependencies & Libraries

Load packages

library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(MetBrewer)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)
library(readxl)
library(pathview)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(GO.db)
getMetaTERMS.df<-function(pathMETA){
    #import data sheets
    final.GO<-read.csv(paste0(pathMETA, "/Enrichment_GO/_FINAL_GO.csv"))
    all.GO<-read.csv(paste0(pathMETA, "/Enrichment_GO/GO_AllLists.csv"))
    go.gene.id<-read_excel(paste0(pathMETA,"/metascape_result.xlsx"),sheet = 1)
    meta.pre.selected<-read.csv(paste0(pathMETA,"//Enrichment_heatmap/HeatmapSelectedGO.csv"))
    
    ## filter META_GROUP_TERMs
    final.GO.flt<-final.GO %>% 
        filter(GO %in% meta.pre.selected$GO)
        
    
    groups<-grep("X_LogP_",colnames(final.GO), value = T)
    group.names<-str_split_i(groups,"_LogP_",2)
    
    df<-data.frame(
        GO=rep(final.GO.flt$GO,length(groups)),
        Description=rep(final.GO.flt$Description,length(groups)),
        group=rep(group.names, each=nrow(final.GO.flt)),
        neg.log.pVal=melt(final.GO.flt[,groups])$value*(-1))
    
    #get q-values
    mx.df.all<-match(paste(df$GO,df$group,sep=":"),
              paste(all.GO$GO,all.GO$GeneList,sep=":"))
    
    #q values
    df$neg.log.qVal=all.GO$Log.q.value.[mx.df.all]*(-1)
    #exchange NAs
    df <- df %>% mutate(neg.log.qVal = replace_na(neg.log.qVal, 0))
    
    
    # get numb of genes shared in group and GO list
    df$Hits.nGenes <- 0
    df$GeneID <- NA
    df$original_id <- NA
   
    ## fill in gaps no match in all.GO
    for(i in 1: length(mx.df.all)){
       GOid<-df[i,"GO"]
       if(length(grep(GOid, colnames(go.gene.id)))>0){
           group.id<-df[i,"group"]
           getGenes.full<-go.gene.id %>% 
               dplyr::select(Gene,group.id, contains(GOid), original_id) 
           colnames(getGenes.full)<-c("Gene", "group", "targetGO", "original_id")
           subset<-getGenes.full %>% filter(group==1 & targetGO==1)
           if(nrow(subset)>0){
               df$Hits.nGenes[i] <-nrow(subset)
               df$GeneID[i] <- paste(subset$Gene, collapse = "|")
               df$original_id[i]<-paste(subset$original_id, collapse = "|")
         }
       }

    }
    df$GeneID<-replace_na(df$GeneID, "-")
    df$GeneSymbol<-replace_na(df$GeneSymbol, "-")
    return(df)
}

##Import data

df.full<-getMetaTERMS.df(pathMETA="meatscape_p01_min5_bg/")
## No id variables; using all as measure variables
GO.selected<-df.full %>% 
    filter(neg.log.qVal > 2) %>% pull(GO)

df<-df.full %>% 
    filter(GO %in% GO.selected)

# sort terms by pvalue
df$Description<-factor(df$Description, 
    levels=rev(unique(df$Description[order(df$neg.log.pVal,decreasing = T)])))
    
g<-ggplot(df,aes(x=group, y=Description, fill=neg.log.qVal, size=neg.log.qVal))+
    geom_point(colour="black",pch=21)+theme_bw()+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colours=c("white",
                            met.brewer("Tam", n=100,type="continuous")
                            ),
                         name="-log(q-value)")+xlab("")+ylab("")+
                        scale_size(range = c(0.2,8), name="-log(q-value)")

print(g) 

g.gene<-ggplot(df,aes(x=group, y=Description, fill=neg.log.qVal, 
                             size=Hits.nGenes))+
    geom_point(colour="black",pch=21)+theme_bw()+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colours=c("white",
                            met.brewer("Tam", n=100,type="continuous")
                            ),
                         name="-log(q-value)")+xlab("")+ylab("")+
                        scale_size(range = c(0.5,6), name="number of genes in term")

print(g.gene)

df$group<-df$group %>% 
    str_replace_all("cluster1", "cl4") %>% 
    str_replace_all("cluster2", "cl1") %>% 
    str_replace_all("cluster3", "cl3") %>%
    str_replace_all("cluster4", "cl2") 

g.gene<-ggplot(df,aes(x=group, y=Description, fill=neg.log.qVal, 
                             size=Hits.nGenes))+
    geom_point(colour="black",pch=21)+theme_bw()+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colours=c("white",
                            met.brewer("Tam", n=100,type="continuous")
                            ),
                         name="-log(q-value)")+xlab("")+ylab("")+
                        scale_size(range = c(0.5,6), name="number of genes in term")


print(g.gene)
